description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a flat roof and a spacious, open-plan layout. The structure features large windows along the exterior walls, allowing for ample natural light, and a mix of white and dark facade materials. The backyard is enclosed by a wooden fence and includes a variety of outdoor amenities such as a swimming pool, hot tub, trampoline, patio seating, and a treehouse. The front of the bungalow has a small entryway with steps leading up to the main door, and the landscaping includes several trees and shrubs. The interior is divided into multiple rooms, including bedrooms, a kitchen, living areas, and bathrooms, all visible through the open roof design. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and extensive outdoor amenities including a pool, patio, and treehouse. The design emphasizes open-plan living and contemporary landscaping.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the backyard with a pool, trampoline, hot tub, patio seating, and a treehouse, as well as the open-plan interior layout.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the front facade, entryway steps, and the arrangement of rooms along the front of the bungalow.
description_view_2: View 2 provides a side perspective, showing the kitchen area, side yard, and part of the backyard amenities.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the backyard, showcasing the treehouse, patio, pool, and recreational spaces, with the bungalow's rear facade visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows along the facade
